title: China Regional 3km Downscaling Based on Residual Corrective Diffusion Model
abstract: Statistical downscaling using diffusion-based framework for CMA-GFS model outputs to generate 3km forecasts.

title: Towards Kriging-informed Conditional Diffusion for Regional Sea-Level Data Downscaling
abstract: Kriging-informed Conditional Diffusion Probabilistic Model (Ki-CDPM) for spatial downscaling.

title: Generative downscaling of PDE solvers with physics-guided diffusion models
abstract: Physics-Guided Diffusion Model (PGDM) for downscaling PDE solver outputs.

title: Generative Adversarial Models for Extreme Geospatial Downscaling
abstract: Conditional GAN-based stochastic geospatial downscaling method with kriging comparison.

title: Integrating Weather Station Data and Radar for Precipitation Nowcasting: SmaAt-Krige-GNet
abstract: SmaAt-Krige-GNet combines Kriging with deep learning for precipitation nowcasting.
